name: ppc-manager
description: 23 skills for end-to-end PPC — Google Ads, Meta Ads, GA4, and GTM — with OAuth-authenticated read/write across all four platforms via bundled Python MCP servers

ppc_vault_passphrase.description: Passphrase used to encrypt the ppc-manager token vault. Pick something strong (16+ chars). Stored in the OS keychain via Claude Code. You will be prompted for this once, on plugin enable.

google_ads_developer_token.description: Google Ads API developer token from ads.google.com > Tools > API Center. Apply for Standard access for production use. Leave blank during first enable and fill in during /ppc-manager:oauth-setup if you don't have one yet.

meta_app_secret.description: Meta app secret from developers.facebook.com > your app > Settings > Basic > App Secret. Never share this. Leave blank during first enable and fill in during /ppc-manager:oauth-setup.

google_oauth_client_secret_path.description: Absolute path to your Google Cloud Console OAuth client_secret.json file. Downloaded from APIs & Services > Credentials > Desktop client > Download JSON. Leave blank to be prompted during /ppc-manager:oauth-setup.

google_ads_login_customer_id.description: Optional MCC (manager account) customer ID for Google Ads, without dashes (e.g. 1234567890). Leave blank if you are not using a manager account.

meta_app_id.description: Meta app ID from developers.facebook.com > your app > Settings > Basic > App ID. This is public; not a secret.

ppc_default_google_account.description: Default Google account label to use when a skill does not specify one. Typically 'default' unless you manage multiple Google accounts.

ppc_default_meta_account.description: Default Meta account label to use when a skill does not specify one. Typically 'default' unless you manage multiple Meta accounts.
